programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The cadets must rescue Earl and race him back to Big Swirl before his Coco Cruiser ruins the little Turkski's birthday party; Inspector Eagle-Eye wants to send the cadets to different Top Wing training centers to be lead cadets.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Swift jets to the rescue when Rod's loud, exuberant singing gets him trapped in an avalanche; Swift and Brody have to rely on each other and their buddy navigating skills to lead some geese to safety in the fog.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Big Rig Blaze is called upon to make three big deliveries all over Axle City, but might need help to finish in time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends set off across the jungle to help a fire beetle return to his home on top of a volcano.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Blaze and Stripes sail to Animal Island, an incredible place inhabited my monster truck animals, a greedy lizard puts the entire island in peril.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a fire on the bridge becomes too much for the fire chief and his team to handle, Blaze is called in to help.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ help a truck named Snowbie get home in time for the Great Snowball Fight.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of "grow spice" onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away; Blaze and Pickle transform into robots to stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a light thief steals all the lights from Axle City, Blaze is outfitted with special lights to help him track down the thief and restore the missing lights.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ race under the ocean; Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: New lifeguard David Hasselhawg teaches the Cadets important life-saving skills, but the Cadets have to go and rescue Davey; Survivor Bear leads a tour, but finds himself in need of a "Top Wing" rescue.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Sandy Stork flies Rhonda's nephew Niko to a party; when Brody's sister Brenda gets lost in the jungle, it's up to Team Top Wing to find her.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Timmy takes his goldfish Snorkel for a walk and accidentally drops his bowl into the river; the cadets have to find him; the cadets are participating in a big balloon race around Big Swirl Island.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Penny saves the day when a stranded polar-bear family floats into the warm water near Big Swirl Island; Team Top Wing saves Shirley Squirrely when her giant flying machine nearly crashes into the ocean.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Brody earns his HQ Command Flyer Pilot's badge when Shirley accidentally launches the Command Flyer; Baddy McBat takes Brody's Splash-Diver so he can make off with rare, precious purple pearls.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Spring means Commodore Smurkturkski gets a new little chick, but Sandy Stork loses the egg; Big Swirl's amazing Dancing Daffodils only bloom in spring; the Cadets rescue Commodore Smurkturkski and his little Turkskis.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into jungle cats in order to race in the Animal Land Championship, but they must beat a cheating cheetah.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: All the trucks in Axle City stay up late for the ultimate race, the Midnight Mile, with the first truck to cross the finish line winning the Glow-in-the-Dark trophy.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a greedy queen casts a spell to make friends slow down, Blaze and AJ must race her for the magical cure.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Gasquatch invites Blaze and AJ to his ice cream party, but forgets the ice cream; Blaze transforms into an ice cream truck and races to reach Gasquatch's house in time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: On race day, Crusher cheats twice as hard to beat Blaze and Watts -- sending both drivers far, far away; Blaze and Watts become determined to save AJ and Gabby and get back to the race in time to win.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: While Blaze and AJ help their friend Stripes look after some baby animals, the little critters accidentally float away on big bubbles.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod's beloved Rooster Brewster goes missing in `Arrgh Me Snugglies'; then in `Earl the Gadget Squirrel', Earl the Gadget Squirrel builds Shirley a delivery drone that goes out of control.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Baddy teams up with Betty, Chomps and Rocco to hijack the HQ Command Flyer so he can take over Big Swirl; Davey Hasselhawg has to get Cheep, Chirp and friends ready for an awesome wakeboard show when Brody is called to a rescue.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod and Brody try to earn a Jungle Exploring badge, but get lost and must work together to help Swift find them; when some lucky students get to be cadets for a day, Top Wing and their junior cadets end up having to rescue their teacher.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When Baddy McBat rescues Big Swirl residents from problems he caused, the Cadets end up rescuing Baddy; the Cadets accidentally lose Rod's favorite toy; they race the clock to get it back before Rod returns.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod is excited to sing at Rhonda's until Chomps and Rocco take the piano; Margo the Monkey and the Banana Bandits break into Headquarters and try to take off with the HQ Command Flyer.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod proves that he is a rooster, and not a chicken as he finds a little bear cub lost in the Haunted Cave; a jet-flying bat roars into Danger Canyon to show off his prowess.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly makes the chicks mini-pirates to find a treasure chest key; Rod's little brother Romeo is just a "little chicken" until Rod's whole family needs to be rescued.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Pickle puts on a magic show for all of Axle City; when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Starla, the friendly cowgirl truck, loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ try to get it back before Crusher can take it.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blackbelt's Grandma Ninja has awesome moves; when she gets a nasty cold, Blaze, AJ and Blackbelt set out to make the most powerful medicine there is: ninja soup.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Axle City is enjoying the balloon fair until Crusher and Pickle get stuck on a runaway hot air balloon; now, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue their high-flying friends before they crash into the Slime Volcano.
